intro: Diplostachyum eatonii, also known as Eaton's pine or Diplostachys, is a species of tree native to the Himalayas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Diplostachyum eatonii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
